allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add subsystem folder structure \(Melhoria 01\)

- Add `subsystem` field to PipelineConfig \(default: "sihsus"\)
- Add PipelineConfig.create\(\) factory method for automatic path configuration
- Creates standardized directory structure: base_dir/{subsystem}/dbc|dbf|parquet/
- Update basic_usage.py to use new factory method

This allows organizing data by DataSUS subsystem \(SIHSUS, SIM, SIASUS, etc\)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add source_file column to track origin DBC file \(Melhoria 02\)

- Extract original DBC filename \(e.g., RDSP2301.dbc\) alongside UF code
- Add source_file column to staging tables during DBF→DuckDB streaming
- Add source_file to SIHSUS_PARQUET_SCHEMA definition
- Column is propagated through both DataFrame and chunked paths

This enables incremental updates by tracking which files are already processed.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for branch in feature/modular-transformations feature/raw-export feature/csv-export feature/named-exports fix/pypi-metadata)
